rows.label: tlk45420144_03_msg0001
rows.name:
It feels like the life has
really returned to Hræsvelgr
thanks to all of you.

rows.label: tlk45420144_03_msg0002
rows.name:
As the Merc Group grows, jobs
should increase too. For more,
go find them yourself.

rows.label: tlk45420144_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Best way is to keep your eyes out
for people who look like they need
help, and talking to 'em directly!

rows.label: tlk45420144_03_msg0004
rows.name:
You might want to try
heading back to towns
you've already visited, even.
